visible_entities.desc: dark, viscous liquid pool, black in color, filling a rectangular cavity
white, rectangular, porous block with black speckles and brown staining
thick, dark brown cables or hoses, curved and bundled
reddish-brown, rough-textured surface, possibly rusted metal or wood

atomic_facts.fact: A pool of black liquid sits inside a rectangular container.
A dirty white block rests on the edge of the container.
Dark cables hang above the liquid pool.

spatial: The pool of black liquid is in the center, contained within a rectangular cavity. The white block is positioned at the bottom-left edge of the cavity, partially resting on the rim. The dark cables are located above the liquid, arching across the top of the frame. The reddish-brown surface is visible to the right of the cavity.
